insurability.boundary: WHERE (domain membership) = decidable, recomputable, hard-to-fool · NOT WHETHER (within-domain quality) = undecidable, the LLM's job
insurability.basis_risk: low — the trigger IS the peril (we measure domain membership, not a proxy)
insurability.foolable: hard — gzip-NCD reads structure, not keywords; off-domain prose with keywords jammed in still does not compress like the domain
insurability.status: PERIL FIRED — the delivery LEFT the spec's competence domain (insured event · decidable · signed · recomputable)

receipt.verdict_reason: the delivery covered only 0/7 (0%) of the spec's own requirements above the off-domain background — off-domain / UNINSURABLE work, the spec was not built

triptych.anatomy: INTENT(cyan) / REALITY(amber) / DELTA(red), 144 ShortLex anchors, 4×4 blocks of 3×3
